description: Reprocess failed temporal graph sources and raise parallelism to 5 with guarded rollback

userStories.title: Capture pre-reprocess status and failed buckets
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a baseline of graph source counts and failed buckets so that retries can be measured without exposing chat contents.
acceptanceCriteria: Record `GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json` snapshot including running/pending/processing/processed/failed/source_count/workers/enqueue_workers/last_error before any recovery command.
Run a readonly SQLite bucket query against `graph_source_records` and output only status='failed' counts by normalized error prefix for private-safe observability.
Record `GET /api/v1/graph/config?format=json` baseline values.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass with `go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph`

userStories.title: Requeue recoverable failed temporal graph sources with incremental rebuild
userStories.description: As an operator, I want failed sources to be re-queued without resetting graph outputs, so the graph can continue processing remaining work.
acceptanceCriteria: Call `POST /api/v1/graph/rebuild?format=json` with either body `{"reset": false}` or query `reset=false`.
Response contains `ok=true` and includes `status`.
Within 60 seconds, `GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json` shows failed non-increasing and pending not decreasing unexpectedly.
Run the readonly failed-bucket query again and confirm recoverable classes decrease while explicit non-recoverable classes remain in failed.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass with `go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph ./internal/chatlog/semantic`

userStories.title: Raise graph enqueue and worker concurrency to 5
userStories.description: As an operator, I want graph processing to use 5 workers and 5 enqueue workers to increase throughput safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Call `POST /api/v1/graph/config?format=json` with `{"workers":5, "enqueue_workers":5}` and receive `status.workers=5` and `status.enqueue_workers=5` in the response.
Call `GET /api/v1/graph/config?format=json` and verify persisted values remain `workers=5`, `enqueue_workers=5`.
Call `GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json` and verify `workers=5`, `enqueue_workers=5`.
Capture `processing_rate_per_minute` and compare against pre-change snapshot.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass with `go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph`

userStories.title: Protective rollback for non-recoverable failure bursts
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a bounded fallback path when failures increase, so 5-way concurrency can be rolled back without data loss.
acceptanceCriteria: Call `POST /api/v1/graph/pause?format=json` and verify `GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json` shows `paused=true`.
Call `POST /api/v1/graph/config?format=json` to `workers=3` and `enqueue_workers=3`, and verify the API response persists these values.
Call `GET /api/v1/graph/config?format=json` and `GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json` to confirm rollback before resume.
Call `POST /api/v1/graph/resume?format=json` and observe one full 5-minute window where `failed` and `last_error` do not continuously escalate.
Append the rollback action and timestamp to `progress.md` and `scripts/ralph/progress.txt`.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass with `go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph`

userStories.title: Drive failed and pending queues toward zero in a bounded convergence window
userStories.description: As an operator, I need objective convergence checks so failed/pending can be reduced to zero and kept stable within a defined runtime window.
acceptanceCriteria: Capture baseline `GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json` fields `running`, `pending`, `processed`, `failed`, `source_count`, and `last_error` before convergence checks.
Run a 10-minute loop (e.g., `for i in $(seq 1 10); do ...; sleep 60; done`) that calls `GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json` every 60s and records snapshots.
In the loop, require `failed` to be non-increasing and `pending` to be non-increasing in each step.
The story passes only if there are 3 consecutive snapshots with `failed == 0` and `pending == 0`.
Persist snapshots to `scripts/ralph/progress.txt` with timestamps for audit.
If the 10-minute window cannot reach zero, append the residual baseline/observed values and mark the story `blocked=true` with a clear note for next iteration.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass with `go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph`
userStories.notes: Window-ended before 3 consecutive zero-failed/zero-pending snapshots. 10x60s loop completed (12:21:36 -> 12:30:36 +0800): failed stuck at 12, pending drained 15168 -> 15068 (~10/min). source_count=21008, workers=3, enqueue_workers=3. Single-zero in 10min is structurally unreachable; needs longer window (>=2-3h) or a different termination criterion (e.g. failed=0 stable, pending within X% of source_count). See scripts/ralph/progress.txt 12:21 entry for raw samples and analysis.

userStories.title: Classify and isolate non-retryable failures
userStories.description: As an operator, I need the 12 persistent failed sources to stop blocking convergence so retry logic focuses on recoverable work.
acceptanceCriteria: Run a readonly SQLite query on `graph_source_records` for `status='failed'` and output counts by normalized `error` prefix; verify non-retryable classes include `sensitive_1026/1027` and `json_decode_or_format`.
Implement a non-retryable failure classifier so these classes are marked clearly and skipped from tight retry loops.
Add decoder guard so malformed model output in the temporal graph semantic path is caught and converted into a deterministic non-retryable classification.
Add/adjust unit tests in `internal/chatlog/temporalgraph` for both classes (no private content in test fixtures).
Run `go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph` and confirm PASS.
Run `./init.sh` quick gate and confirm PASS.
userStories.notes: Completed as part of HA-004 (recoverable/non-recoverable bucketing + 1026/1027 isolation). The HA-004 AC set is a strict superset of US-006; merged in 2026-06-07 PRD consolidation.

userStories.title: Use practical convergence thresholds for large backlogs
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a convergence target that matches current throughput so progress can be measured without false blocking.
acceptanceCriteria: Before rerun, capture `GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json` baseline including `pending`, `processed`, `failed`, `source_count`, and `workers`.
Run a 3-hour observation loop (180 × 60s) with per-minute snapshots and log to `scripts/ralph/progress.txt`.
Pass if `failed` is non-increasing and `pending` has decreased at least 10% versus baseline.
If `failed` is still > 0 after 3 hours, include the residual class-level `failed` breakdown in notes and set `blocked=true` with a follow-up fix plan.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass with `go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph`
userStories.notes: Completed as part of HA-007 (end-to-end HA validation with 10min window + processed/failed movement). HA-007 replaces the 3h-observation criterion with an E2E validation; merged in 2026-06-07 PRD consolidation.

userStories.title: Runtime Chat readiness is observable and self-healable
userStories.description: 作为本地运维执行者,我想要系统明确显示 Temporal Graph 所依赖的 Chat provider、model、API key 可用性和启动配置来源,以便在配置漂移时能自动恢复到可处理状态。
acceptanceCriteria: 启动服务后,GET /api/v1/semantic/config?format=json 返回 chat_provider=mmx、目标 chat_model、has_api_key=true。
新增或扩展的 runtime status 返回 configured_key_count=5,但响应中不包含任何以 sk- 开头的真实 key。
当服务以错误配置启动并导致 chat model is not configured 时,运行 HA guard 后 60 秒内再次查询 semantic config,返回 chat_provider=mmx、has_api_key=true、configured_key_count=5。
HA guard 的 dry-run 输出只包含配置状态、key 数量、tmux/session/process 可见性和计划动作,不打印真实 API key。
bash -n scripts/chatlog-ha-guard.sh 通过。

userStories.title: MiniMax 5-key pool status can be inspected safely
userStories.description: 作为系统调优者,我想要看到 MiniMax key pool 的可用 key 数、忙闲状态和错误桶,以便判断并发是否真的吃到了 5 个 key,而不是只靠环境变量猜测。
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v1/semantic/mmx/status?format=json 或等价状态接口返回 configured_key_count=5、busy_key_count、idle_key_count、leased_request_count、retry_count、last_error_bucket。
状态接口对 key 只返回稳定脱敏 label,例如 key_1、key_2,不返回完整 key、key 前缀或可还原片段。
使用 5 个逗号分隔的 MINIMAX_API_KEYS 启动服务后,状态接口稳定显示 configured_key_count=5。
当其中一个 key 出现可识别的鉴权错误时,状态接口显示该 key label 进入隔离或失败状态,后续请求不会继续优先使用该 key。
go test ./internal/chatlog/semantic 覆盖 key count、脱敏输出、错误 key 隔离和敏感错误不切 key。

userStories.title: Graph workers adapt to key-pool health
userStories.description: 作为 Temporal Graph 使用者,我想要系统在稳定时自动使用 5 并发,在 rate-limit、timeout 或上游延迟上升时自动降级,以便兼顾处理效率和失败率。
acceptanceCriteria: 当 configured_key_count=5 且最近观察窗口没有 rate-limit/timeout 激增时,GET /api/v1/graph/status?format=json 显示 workers=5。
当最近观察窗口内 rate_limited、network_timeout 或 before_request_timeout 数量超过阈值时,系统在下一次调度窗口内将 workers 降到小于 5,并能通过 GET /api/v1/graph/config?format=json 读回。
降级后,如果连续稳定窗口内 failed 不增加、last_error 为空或只有非重试桶,系统逐步恢复到不超过 configured_key_count 的 worker 数。
workers 永远不超过 configured_key_count 和现有 maxGraphWorkers 上限。
go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph 覆盖稳定升并发、错误降并发、恢复升并发和上限保护。

userStories.title: Failed sources are bucketed before any requeue
userStories.description: 作为数据安全负责人,我想要系统先按错误类型统计 failed sources,再只重试可恢复错误,以便避免把 sensitive 或无效请求失败反复打到模型 API。
acceptanceCriteria: readonly SQLite bucket 查询或等价 HTTP 状态能统计 config_error、network_timeout、before_request_timeout、rate_limited、auth_error、json_decode_error、empty_graph、sensitive_input_1026、sensitive_output_1027、non_retryable_request。
POST /api/v1/graph/resume?format=json 只 requeue recoverable buckets:config_error、network_timeout、before_request_timeout、rate_limited。
sensitive_input_1026 和 sensitive_output_1027 在 resume 后仍保持 failed,不进入 pending。
requeue 前后状态快照包含 failed、pending、processed、processing、last_error,不包含私聊正文、source payload 或 prompt 内容。
go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph 覆盖 recoverable 与 non-recoverable bucket 的 requeue 行为。

userStories.title: Model routing keeps M2.7 as baseline and gates m2.1 by benchmark
userStories.description: 作为效果评估者,我想要用脱敏 fixture 对 m2.1 和 MiniMax-M2.7 做同 prompt 对比,以便只有在准确性达标时才把 m2.1 用作 fast path。
acceptanceCriteria: 提供一个不含真实聊天正文的 benchmark fixture,覆盖短句、省略语、时间表达、多人对话、业务实体、关系方向和空信息样本。
benchmark 输出至少包含 json_valid_rate、non_empty_graph_rate、entity_count_delta、fact_count_delta、event_count_delta、relation_count_delta、decode_retry_rate、avg_latency_ms。
如果 m2.1 的 json_valid_rate 低于 MiniMax-M2.7 超过 2 个百分点,或 non_empty_graph_rate 低于 MiniMax-M2.7 超过 5 个百分点,系统不得把 m2.1 设置为默认 fast path。
如果 m2.1 通过 benchmark,系统只将它用于低风险 bulk extraction;json_decode_error、低质量输出和关键来源仍升级到 MiniMax-M2.7 或配置的质量兜底模型。
benchmark 命令默认 dry-run 或 fixture-only,不调用真实私聊 source 内容。

userStories.title: HA guard becomes a supported operator workflow
userStories.description: 作为长期运行任务维护者,我想要一个可重复执行的 guard 命令检查 health、semantic config、key count、graph status 和失败桶,以便 graph worker 可以在 tmux/launchd 场景下自动恢复。
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/chatlog-ha-guard.sh --dry-run 返回当前 health、semantic provider/model、key count、workers、failed bucket 摘要和计划动作。
scripts/chatlog-ha-guard.sh 在服务健康、config 正确、key count 为 5、workers 正确时重复运行不会改变状态。
当 guard 发现服务未使用 serve --config-dir .cache/daily-report-config 或 process key count 不是 5 时,会执行明确恢复动作,并在输出中记录动作结果。
scripts/chatlog-ha-guard.sh --loop 60 能以 60 秒间隔运行,并在每轮输出时间戳、状态摘要和是否采取动作。
guard 的所有输出不包含真实 API key、私聊正文、source payload、prompt 内容。

userStories.title: End-to-end HA validation proves throughput without hiding failures
userStories.description: 作为项目负责人,我想要一条完整验收路径证明 5-key HA 方案既能处理队列,又不会把失败和敏感错误掩盖掉。
acceptanceCriteria: 在服务运行时执行 curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:5030/health,返回 {"status":"ok"}。
执行 semantic status、MMX key-pool status、graph status 后,能看到 chat_provider=mmx、has_api_key=true、configured_key_count=5、workers<=5。
运行一次 recoverable resume 后,30 秒内 pending 或 processed 至少一个发生预期变化,sensitive_input_1026 / sensitive_output_1027 仍保持 non-requeued。
运行 10 分钟观察窗口后,processed 增加,failed 不因 config drift 大规模增长,last_error 为空或属于已知 bucket。
执行 go test ./internal/chatlog/semantic ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph 和 ./init.sh 均通过,或在 PR/进度记录中明确列出失败命令、exit status、关键错误行和下一步修复。
